Written in an approachable style, the book will be of historical, literary and philological interest to scholars and students, as well as any reader curious about this hitherto little-known Occitan literature"--

Name: Heroic Saga and Classical Epic in Medieval Ireland
Description:
An examination of the ways in which works of Classical literature influenced and were received by the native Irish tradition. Original, innovative work which elucidates a number of individual narratives; but more significantly, by placing these texts in their proper intellectual context, the author demonstrates how the world of learning in eleventh- andtwelfth-century Ireland really worked. He illuminates a world of medieval education and scholarship; he tells us (as no-one has done previously) what medieval Irish classicism was all about. Dr Máire ni Mhaonaigh, St John's College, University of Cambridge. The puzzle of Ireland's role in the preservation of classical learning into the middle ages has always excited scholars, but the evidence from the island's vernacular literature - as opposed to that in Latin - for the study of pagan epic has largely escaped notice. In this book the author breaks new ground by examining the Irish texts alongside the Latin evidence for the study of classical epic in medieval Ireland, surveying the corpus of Irish texts based on histories and poetry from antiquity, in particular Togail Troi, the Irish history of the Fall of Troy. He argues that Irish scholars' study of Virgil and Statius in particularleft a profound imprint on the native heroic literature, especially the Irish prose epic Táin Bó Cúailnge ("The Cattle-Raid of Cooley"). BRENT MILES is a Fellow in Early and Medieval Irish, University College Cork.

Name: Medieval LEGO
Description:
Medieval LEGO takes you through real English history in the middle ages with a unique twist, with every event illustrated by a tiny little LEGO scene. With contributions by medievalists and scholars, this book brings medieval history to life in a fun, kid-friendly way. Inside, you'll learn about events like the Battle of Hastings, the chartering of Oxford University, and the signing of the Magna Carta. You'll witness the infamous Black Death, and the Great Famine, and you'll read about famous historical figures like Robin Hood, Richard the Lionheart, Geoffrey Chaucer, and William the Conqueror. Grab your broadsword and turn the page to join the adventure.

Name: Medieval Warfare in Manuscripts
Description:
The glamour associated with knights in shining armour, colourful tournaments and heroic deeds appeal strongly to the modern imagination. However, few pieces of military dress and equipment have survived to provide direct insight into the way that war was waged in the Middle Ages. For a comprehensive view of the nature of medieval warfare we rely on written documentation and the information preserved in paintings, sculptures, carvings, and other pictorial sources. The most numerous by far of these are the miniatures and drawings found in manuscript books, partly because books tend to survive better that other artefacts and partly because many individual volumes contain multiple representations. Pamela Porter presents and describes a variety of evocative manuscript illuminations in an effort to reveal them as a source of information about military dress, equipment, and practices.

Name: Battle and Bloodshed
Description:
This collection of articles is the result of an interdisciplinary Medieval Studies conference held at the University of Sheffield in 2009. Brutality and aggression were a stark reality of everyday life in the Middle Ages; from individual rebellions through family feuds to epic wars, a history of medieval warfare could easily be read as a history of medieval violence. This volume goes beyond such an analysis by illustrating just how pervasive the nature of war could be, influencing not only medieval historiography and chronicle tradition, but also other disciplines such as art, architecture, literature and law. The overarching and multi-faceted themes bring together both iconic aspects of medieval warfare such as armour and the Crusades, as well as taking in the richness of textual traditions and matters of crucial importance at the time—the justification for war and the means by which peace can be re-established.

Name: Medieval Times
Description:
Medieval England was a time of great change and uncertainty. Readers will be enthralled as they learn about various aspects of the Middle Ages in England including the feudal system, Hundred Years War, War of the Roses, and the bubonic plague. The detailed images and captivating facts and sidebars work in conjunction with easy-to-read text, glossary, and index to give readers an enjoyable and engaging reading experience that introduces them to such rulers as Henry II, Thomas Beckett, Eleanor of Aquitaine, and Richard the Lion Hearted.

Name: Medieval Epics and Sagas
Description:
"The thousand year gap between the fall of Rome and the dawn of the Renaissance is sometimes dismissed as a cultural wasteland, a benighted period aptly called the Dark Ages. While it's true the arts and sciences didn't ... thrive during this time, the gift of literacy brought by Christian missionaries to the various tribes of Europe kept one literary form alive: the epic. Part poetry, part adventure story, the epic celebrated the deeds of heroes and dramatized a nation's cultural and religious ideals..."--Preface.

Name: Women and the Medieval Epic
Description:
These essays explore the place, function and meaning of women as characters, authors, constructs and symbols in Medieval epics from Persia, Spain, France, England, Germany and Scandinavia. Usually believed to narrate the deeds of men at war, this book looks at the key roles often played by women and the impact of this on the history of gender.

Name: Mental Wealth
Description:
Mental Wealth reveals an approach to workplace mental health and wellbeing that is proven to actually get results. Despite having a huge impact on the productivity, profitability, and culture of organizations, there is very little guidance currently provided to managers and leaders on how to effectively manage workplace mental health and wellbeing. What does exist is often focused on the legal aspects of minimizing risk that it misses the psychology of workplace mental health and high performance and actually ends up creating risk for workplaces. Mental Wealth is a guide for managers and leaders on how to manage employees who may be experiencing mental health issues in the workplace. Founders of the Workplace Mental Health Institute, Peter Diaz and Emi Golding, provide an essential foundation for addressing workplace mental health. Some of the essential foundations discussed include dispelling myths about workplace mental health, the factors that cause and contribute to mental health issues, the impact those factors are having on workplaces, the benefits of addressing mental health appropriately, and 7 Pillars for a mentally Wealthy Workplace. Mental Wealth also includes case studies and practical strategies that can be implemented for immediate results.

Name: The Family Guide to Mental Health Care
Description:
Advice on Helping Your Loved Ones, from the medical director of the country's largest state mental health system and the mental health editor of The Huffington Post More than fifty million people a year are diagnosed with some form of mental illness. It spares no sex, race, age, ethnicity, or income level. And left untreated, mental disorders can devastate our families and communities. Family members and friends are often the first to realize when someone has a problem, but it is hard to know how to help or where to turn. Our mental health “system” can feel like a bewildering and frustrating maze. How can you tell that someone has a mental illness? What are the first and best steps for you to take? Where do you go to find the right care? The Family Guide to Mental Health Care is the first comprehensive print resource for the millions of people who have loved ones suffering from some kind of mental illness. In this book, families can find the answers to their most urgent questions. What medications are helpful and are some as dangerous as I think? Is there a way to navigate privacy laws so I can discuss my adult daughter’s treatment with her doctor? Is my teenager experiencing typical adolescent distress or an illness? From understanding depression, bipolar illness and anxiety to eating and traumatic disorders, schizophrenia, and much more, readers will learn what to do and how to help. Real-life scenarios and authoritative information are written in a compassionate, reader-friendly way, including checklists to bring to a doctor’s appointment so you can ask the right questions. For readers who fear they will never see the light at the end of the tunnel, this book gives hope and a path forward. As one of the nation’s leading voices on quality care in mental health, Dr. Lloyd Sederer has played a singular role in advancing services for those with mental illness. Now, the wealth of his expertise and clear guidance is at your disposal. From the first signs of a problem to sorting through the variety of treatment options, you and your family will be able to walk into a doctor’s office know what to do and what to ask.

Name: Mental Health A Pocket Guide
Description:
- Increased consumer focus - New chapter on trauma-informed practice and care - New focus on loss and grief (including loss of employment, relationships, COVID and climate-related events) - Increased focus on self-care, self-awareness and support strategies - Greater emphasis on cultural awareness and working across the lifespan

## Telepsychiatry and Health Technologies: A Practical Guide for Mental Health Professionals

This book, **Telepsychiatry and Health Technologies: A Guide for Mental Health Professionals**, stands as the definitive resource for mental health professionals looking to integrate technology into patient care. It offers a practical, comprehensive, and evidence-based approach to delivering patient-centered clinical services using technological devices and applications.

### Focus on Clinical Application, Not Just Technology

Unlike typical "health informatics" texts, this guide prioritizes clinical issues and workflows. It addresses fundamental technological concerns while emphasizing how these tools can be effectively used in practice. The book is specifically designed for psychiatrists, psychologists, and other mental health clinicians eager to understand the various modes, models, and methods of telepsychiatry.

### Expert Contributions and Real-World Examples

The development of this text involved over 30 telepsychiatry practitioners from across the core mental health disciplines. These experts contributed their knowledge and real-world clinical examples to create a rich and informative resource. The book is filled with case studies and hands-on guidance, presenting strategies and then clearly illustrating how to implement them.

### A Structured Approach to Learning

The editors meticulously planned the book's conception and design to meet the needs of today's clinicians. They employed a unique manuscript development process:

*   **Chapter Outlines:** Each chapter was fully outlined first.
*   **Expert Assignment:** Sections were then assigned to contributors chosen for their specific clinical experience and therapeutic expertise.

This approach ensures a logical flow and creates synergy between chapters, avoiding unnecessary repetition.

### Key Topics Covered

The book provides essential "how-to" guidance for both establishing a new telepsychiatry practice and integrating technologies into an existing one. Critical topics addressed include:

*   Data collection strategies
*   Ensuring data security
*   Utilizing electronic health records

### Technologies Explored

The guide covers a range of technologies increasingly used in the assessment and treatment of psychiatric disorders:

*   Telephony
*   Smartphones
*   Mobile applications (apps)
*   Email
*   Secure texting
*   Videoconferencing

### Illustrative Case Studies

More than 30 case examples are included, featuring patients or programs. These examples demonstrate:

*   The diverse range of clinical techniques applicable through technology.
*   The types of patients who can be effectively treated using these tools.
*   The flexibility of care delivery, whether in-person, online, or through a hybrid model.

### Learning and Reference Value

Each chapter concludes with a summary of major learning objectives or key findings. **Telepsychiatry and Health Technologies: A Guide for Mental Health Professionals** is poised to become a foundational resource for training mental health professionals across all disciplines. It will also serve as an indispensable reference for practitioners already incorporating new technologies into their work. The editors believe that the future of psychiatry lies in treating populations efficiently and effectively, and technology offers the most promising path to achieving this goal.

**Mental Health and Wellbeing in the Workplace: A Comprehensive Guide**

***HIGHLY COMMENDED - HR & MANAGEMENT - BUSINESS BOOK AWARDS 2021***

This essential guide offers practical advice for both employers and employees on fostering positive mental health and providing support for those experiencing mental ill health within the workplace.

**The Growing Importance of Workplace Mental Health**

The significance of good mental health and wellbeing at work is receiving increasing public and governmental attention. The Department of Health highlights that one in four individuals will face a mental health issue during their lifetime. Despite recent advancements and initiatives, many employers still grapple with effectively promoting the mental health and wellbeing of their workforce.

**Expert Guidance for a Healthier Work Environment**

*Mental Health & Wellbeing in the Workplace* delivers expert insights to enhance mental health and support employees facing mental ill health. This comprehensive book delves into the multifaceted issues surrounding mental health and wellbeing in work settings, offering informative and actionable assistance to all stakeholders.

**Key Areas Explored:**

*   **Understanding Mental Health's Impact:** The book clarifies why understanding mental health is crucial and its direct effects on both businesses and individual employees.
*   **Promoting Wellbeing and Strategy:** It discusses the rationale and methods for promoting mental health in the workplace, emphasizing the necessity of a robust 'wellbeing strategy'.
*   **Managing Mental Ill Health:** Guidance is provided on effectively managing staff members who are experiencing mental ill health.
*   **Addressing Stress and Anxiety:** The guide offers strategies for dealing with employee stress and anxiety.
*   **Resources for Support:** It features valuable resources for individuals seeking further support for mental health issues.

**Practical Solutions and Real-World Insights**

Authors Gill Hasson and Donna Butler explore the evolving workplace environment and its impact on wellbeing. They examine shifts in employer and employee attitudes towards mental health, and propose solutions to current and future challenges. Detailed, real-world case studies offer diverse perspectives from both employer and employee viewpoints, illustrating a range of associated concerns.

**A Vital Resource**

*Mental Health & Wellbeing in the Workplace* serves as an invaluable resource for anyone in the workplace aiming to prioritize their physical and mental wellbeing, as well as for those seeking guidance on managing staff with mental health concerns.

Name: Mental Health, Naturally
Description:
With up-to-date research, illustrative examples, and a practical approach forindividuals and families, this handbook features an overview of mental healthdisorders, basic strategies for improving as well as preventing mental healthissues, and more.

Name: Student Mental Health
Description:
The chapter authors address life transitions and the university student experience, as well as the challenges of caring for university students with mental health issues. The book has positive strategies, including ways to foster mental health for distinct university student populations.

Name: Authoritative Guide to Self-help Resources in Mental Health
Description:
Self-help materials have become a prime source of psychological advice for millions of Americans. While many self-help resources provide high-quality information and support, others may be misleading, inaccurate, or even harmful. This indispensable volume reveals which are the good ones, which are the bad ones, and why. Based on the results of 5 national studies involving over 2,500 mental health professionals, the book reviews and rates 600+ self-help books, autobiographies, and popular films. In addition, hundreds of helpful Internet sites are described and evaluated by a clinical psychologist, and valuable listings are provided of national and online support groups. The concluding chapter presents practical guidelines for selecting an effective self-help resource. Addressing 28 of the most prevalent clinical disorders and life challenges--from ADHD, Alzheimer's, and anxiety disorders, to marital problems and mood disorders, to weight management and women's issues--this timely book will be tremendously useful to consumers and professionals alike.

Name: Understanding Mental Illness
Description:
“Skillfully crafted, thoughtful, and expertly written.” —Sheryl Denise Jones, MD “Comprehensive and educational . . . from a practical and relatable point of view." —Napoleon Higgins, MD “A well needed resource! . . . It allows us to better understand and support the people we care about, but who struggle with mental illness.” —Thomas Kerrihard, MD Get the straight facts about mental illness from two Harvard trained psychiatrists. More than 40 million people in the US suffer from mental health problems—yet less than half receive adequate care and treatment. Even in the 21st century with the most advanced medical care in the world, social stigma still surrounds psychiatric problems, and this, combined with a lack of understanding, perpetuates a national mental health crisis affecting those in need and their families. Ignoring and/or being unaware of a problem can have devastating effects in our families and for society at large—many people living with mental illness go untreated, and as a result, people with untreated mental illnesses make up one third of the nation’s homeless population and can be imprisoned. To meet these challenges, Dr. Carlin Barnes and Dr. Marketa Wills have written this necessary and comprehensive, practical guide to educate and help everyone better understand mental health. Each chapter offers insights and wisdom concerning a variety of psychiatric conditions, including: Mood disorders Anxiety disorders Personality disorders Substance abuse issues Eating disorders Women’s mental health issues Suicide in America Geriatric mental health Professional athletes and mental health And more Armed with this knowledge, you and your loved one can better appreciate the real struggles at hand, and as a result, seek the proper care needed.

## Supporting Mental Wellness in Adults with Down Syndrome: A Comprehensive Guide

Navigating the mental wellness landscape for adults with Down syndrome requires a nuanced understanding of their unique strengths and potential challenges. The resource **MENTAL WELLNESS IN ADULTS WITH DOWN SYNDROME** offers an invaluable, in-depth exploration of this critical topic. Authored by pioneers who established the first medical clinic specifically for adults with Down syndrome, this guide provides a wealth of knowledge, presented in an accessible and encouraging manner.

### Recognizing Strengths and Differentiating Concerns

A fundamental principle highlighted in **MENTAL WELLNESS** is the importance of appreciating the inherent strengths of individuals with Down syndrome. It's crucial to distinguish between genuine mental health concerns and characteristics that are typical of Down syndrome. For example, while self-talk might sometimes be a sign of psychosis, for many adults with Down syndrome, it's a practical tool for problem-solving and cognitive processing. This guide equips readers to make these important distinctions.

### What's New in the Second Edition?

The second edition of **MENTAL WELLNESS** has been thoroughly updated to reflect the latest research and clinical insights. It introduces significant new content and expands upon existing topics to provide even more comprehensive support.

Key additions and enhancements include:

*   **New Chapters:**
    *   Sensory Issues, expertly authored by Dr. Katie Frank.
    *   Regression, offering insights into understanding and addressing this phenomenon.
*   **Expanded Chapters:**
    *   Communication, providing deeper strategies for effective interaction.
    *   Concrete Thinking, exploring its implications for understanding and support.
    *   Visual Memory, detailing its role and how to leverage it.
*   **Updated Chapter:**
    *   Alzheimer's Disease, now incorporating extensive new research and updated recommendations.

### Addressing a Spectrum of Mental Health Conditions

This guide offers a detailed examination of various mental health conditions that may affect adults with Down syndrome, alongside practical strategies for assessment and treatment. It covers a wide array of topics, including:

*   Defining "Normal" in the context of Down syndrome.
*   Fostering positive self-esteem and self-image.
*   Understanding and supporting self-talk as a coping mechanism.
*   Navigating flexibility and the importance of routines.
*   Life-span considerations for mental health.
*   Developing and supporting social skills.
*   Identifying and managing mood and anxiety disorders.
*   Addressing Obsessive-Compulsive Disorder (OCD).
*   Recognizing and supporting individuals with psychotic disorders.
*   Strategies for managing eating refusal.
*   Approaches to challenging behaviors.
*   Understanding and supporting individuals with self-injurious behavior.
*   Co-occurring Autism Spectrum Disorder (ASD).
*   Differentiating and managing tics, Tourette Syndrome, and stereotypies.

While not all individuals with Down syndrome will experience mental health problems, certain biological predispositions and environmental factors can increase vulnerability. This guide provides the essential knowledge and tools for parents, health practitioners, and caregivers to promote positive mental health, effectively assess concerns, and implement appropriate treatment strategies. How can we best support the mental well-being of adults with Down syndrome? This resource offers a clear path forward.

Name: Missing Person
Description:
From acclaimed thriller writer Sarah Lotz, hailed by Stephen King as "vastly entertaining," a new novel about a group of amateur detectives infiltrated by the sadistic killer whose crimes they're investigating. Reclusive bookseller Shaun Ryan has always believed that his uncle Teddy died in a car accident twenty years ago. Then he learns the truth: Teddy fled his home in Catholic, deeply conservative County Wicklow, Ireland, for New York and hasn't been heard from since. None of Shaun's relatives will reveal why they lied about his uncle's death or why they want Shaun to leave the whole affair alone. But Shaun has a burning need to find out the truth. His search is unsuccessful until he's contacted by Chris Guzman, a woman who runs a website dedicated to matching missing-persons cases with unidentified bodies. Chris and her team of cold-case obsessives suspect that Shaun is looking for the "Boy in the Dress," one victim in a series of gay men murdered by the same killer. But who are these internet fanatics really, and how do they know so much about a case that has stumped police for decades? Soon armchair sleuths and professional investigators are on a collision course with a sadistic serial killer who's gotten away with his crimes for far too long - and now they're in his sights.

## Understanding the Complex Phenomenon of Missing Persons

The issue of missing persons, defined as individuals whose whereabouts are unknown and for whom there is a genuine concern for their wellbeing, is a significant societal challenge. In the United Kingdom alone, an estimated 250,000 individuals are reported missing annually, with a concerning proportion being children under the age of 18. While the phenomenon of missing persons touches upon numerous areas of interest, a comprehensive understanding of who goes missing, their experiences while absent, and effective prevention strategies remains surprisingly limited.

### A Comprehensive Exploration of Missing Persons

This seminal publication offers a groundbreaking approach by consolidating diverse ideas and expertise from across the broad spectrum of missing persons issues into a single, interconnected resource. It delves into critical aspects of this complex subject, including the specific challenges associated with missing children and adults. Furthermore, the book meticulously examines the intricate investigative processes involved in missing person cases, providing valuable insights for both professionals and those new to the field.

### Supporting Families and Advancing Knowledge

A crucial element explored within this work is the profound impact on the families of missing persons. The publication aims to foster a deeper understanding of their experiences and the support systems available. Through detailed chapters, readers, regardless of their prior knowledge, will gain a more expansive comprehension of various topics relevant to this field. The book not only advances our understanding of this complex phenomenon but also candidly discusses existing knowledge gaps and proposes essential steps forward to further enrich our collective understanding and develop more effective solutions.

Name: Missing 411- Hunters
Description:
(www.canammissing.com- missing person site)Author David Paulides has released the sixth installment in his best selling series, Missing 411. The books have revealed the names and facts behind people who have disappeared in the national parks and forests of the world. The identification of over 59 geographical clusters of missing people in North America is one of the mysterious, unsettling and unexplained elements in the Missing 411 series. Missing 411- Hunters explains a subset of the research and documents 148 cases of hunters who have vanished in four countries. The incidents parallel other disappearances documented in prior Missing 411 books. The vast majority of the cases in this edition are new and they don't appear in other books in the series. The mystery and stories of the victims will baffle and confound the avid outdoorsman and seasoned hunter.Countries Included:United States- 26 StatesCanada- 9 ProvincesAustraliaAzerbaijianDisappearances Documented:148348 PagesOther Books in the Series:Missing 411- Western United StatesMissing 411- Eastern United StatesMissing 411- North America and BeyondMissing 411- The Devil's in the DetailMissing 411- A Sobering Coincidencewww.canammissing.com

Name: Missing
Description:
Cases of missing people that defy explanation! Some missing person cases are more bizarre and mysterious than others. This book reports such cases. We often tend to think that we can easily find the explanation to everything around us, yet there are so many situations where this is not possible. People themselves continue to disappear seemingly without a trace even with all of the technological and scientific advancement that humanity has had. People disappear every single day, but there are a few cases that simply defy explanation. There are those who have walked into forests and never come out. There are people who have disappeared from secure compounds with no explanation, and even individuals who seem to have vanished into thin air right in front of security cameras. As much as we would like to find some mundane explanation for these cases, a persistent percentage of disappearances remain completely mysterious in every sense of the word. Here in this book, we have brought together some of the most mind-boggling of these strange instances of abrupt vanishing on record, including: The Ill-Fated Alien Abductee Anjikuni, the Vanishing Village Abducted by Bigfoot The Fierce Legend of Ambrose Bierce What Happened to Gerry Irwin? The Mysterious Disappearance of a Manic Street Preacher The Troubling Case of Brandon Lawson And many more! Scroll back up and order your copy today!

Name: Missing Person Case Files Solved
Description:
Vanished into thin air... Disturbing cases of people gone missing and being found again. Read about their mysterious and sometime chilling journey.Missing people are far more common than you might think. Every year, around the world, hundreds of thousands of people vanish into thin air. Usually, they have simply been involved in a freak accident that has led to their death. Sometimes, they vanish on purpose and don't wish to be found. On very rare occasions, there is violence at play and the person has been deliberately removed from the public or even killed.In this book, we will be examining the various circumstances in which people happen to vanish. These circumstances can vary from elegant plans of their own design to freak accidents that result in memory loss. In some cases, we will find that there is a malicious party at play and a far greater crime to be solved. But in every single case, we will learn of someone who vanishes before being found again.So, read on to discover the strange and mysterious events which can drive people away, as well as the emotions and motivations that lead them to come home. With so many people disappearing across the planet, the stories of those who are able to come home are inspirational, fascinating, and - in some cases - almost unbelievable. In this book, we will learn the true stories of the lost and found, the real life events which see people arrive back home after most people might have given up hope. Read on and discover just what it takes to come back.Here are some of the cases that you will find inside:* The young boy abducted by a crazed man* The boy whose kidnap inspired a search and rescue team* The controversial lawyer who vanished for eight years* The rapper who dropped off the radar* The actress who vanished without warning* The man kidnapped by North Korea* The man struck down by a little known medical issue* And many more!Scroll back up and order your copy today

**Cathy Moulton: A Cold Case That Still Haunts Portland**

The disappearance of Cathy Marie Moulton on September 24, 1971, remains one of North America's oldest active missing person investigations. A bright and vibrant 16-year-old, Cathy vanished from Portland, Maine, on what began as an ordinary day, leaving behind a mystery that continues to haunt her family and investigators.

**A Decades-Long Search**

Officially logged as Portland Police Department case #71-60141, Cathy Moulton's case has endured for over four decades. Despite the persistent efforts of investigators and numerous promising leads, the question of her whereabouts persists.

**Renewed Investigation Efforts**

Twenty-five years after Cathy's disappearance, cold case detectives from Portland, Maine, reopened the investigation. This remarkable re-examination involved exceptional cross-jurisdictional cooperation, uniting municipal police detectives and federal criminal investigators. Their collaborative effort spanned North America, from the Canadian provinces of Nova Scotia to British Columbia, and across the United States, from Maine to Florida and California.

**Key Elements of the Renewed Investigation:**

*   **Revisiting Existing Information:** Investigators meticulously re-evaluated all previously gathered evidence and leads.
*   **Pursuing New Avenues:** The team actively developed and followed fresh lines of inquiry.
*   **Extensive Collaboration:** Agencies from both the U.S. and Canada worked together to piece together the puzzle.
*   **Broad Geographic Scope:** The investigation covered a wide range of locations to understand Cathy's potential movements.

This compelling narrative invites readers to follow the dedicated professionals as they navigate the complexities of this decades-old mystery, seeking answers for a family still awaiting closure. The enduring question remains: what truly happened to Cathy Marie Moulton on that fateful day?

## The Cold Vanish: Unraveling Wilderness Disappearances

For fans of Jon Krakauer and Douglas Preston, *The Cold Vanish* delves into the chilling reality of individuals who disappear without a trace in the wilderness. This "authentic and encyclopedic" book, as described by Roman Dial, not only examines these perplexing cases but also introduces the extraordinary individuals dedicated to finding the missing.

### The Mystery of the Vanished

These are not just isolated incidents; they are stories that defy conventional logic and happen more frequently than most people realize, often closer to home than we think. The disappearances explored in *The Cold Vanish* leave behind a profound void for loved ones and present a significant challenge for park superintendents, rangers, and law enforcement tasked with Search & Rescue operations. They are the cases that baffle even the most dedicated volunteers combing mountains, woods, and badlands, serving as a stark reminder to exercise caution during any outdoor excursion.

### A Father's Search, A Deeper Understanding

The narrative is anchored by the poignant story of Jacob Gray's disappearance in Olympic National Park and his father, Randy Gray, who abandoned his life to embark on a relentless search for his son. Through their experience, the book illuminates the profound impact of a missing person and the desperate measures taken to find them.

### The Unconventional Searchers

Woven into this core narrative are the compelling stories of the unique individuals who step into the void left by a vanished person. These include:

*   **Duff and R.C.:** An eccentric bloodhound handler and his prize purebred dog, who began their tracking journey after Duff's own brother vanished in the San Gabriel Mountains.
*   **Michael Neiger:** Renowned as North America's leading backcountry Search & Rescue expert, this self-proclaimed "bushman" is consumed by the obsession of finding missing persons.
*   **David Paulides:** A former San Jose, California detective and a leading researcher of individuals missing on public wildlands, Paulides is also recognized as one of the world's foremost Bigfoot researchers.

### The Nature of Absence

Writing about missing persons presents a unique challenge, as the central theme is the very absence of an individual. The person at the heart of the story is as elusive as smoke, as intangible as a forgotten memory. The "bones" uncovered in these investigations are often metaphorical. While the book acknowledges the role of memory and its fallibility in reconstructing events, *The Cold Vanish* ultimately focuses on the present and the future. The reality is that someone will vanish in the wild tomorrow, and these are the determined individuals who will answer the call to search.

## Solving Cold Cases: Essential Resources for Unidentified, Missing, and Homicide Investigations

Investigating cold cases, where leads have dried up and time has passed, presents a significant challenge for law enforcement and a source of enduring pain for victims' families. The book, *Cold Case Research: Resources for Unidentified, Missing and Cold Homicide Cases*, serves as a vital guide for investigators, demonstrating how to effectively utilize a range of resources to reopen and solve these long-dormant investigations.

### Bridging Modern and Traditional Research Methods

Modern investigators must master 21st-century online tools and evolving methodologies. However, solving cold cases also necessitates a deep dive into historical records. This book uniquely blends traditional research skills with cutting-edge digital resources.

Key resources highlighted include:

*   **TLO:** A leading investigative system offering comprehensive data access.
*   **NamUs:** A crucial database dedicated to missing persons and unidentified remains.

### Practical Tools for Revitalizing Investigations

*Cold Case Research* equips investigators with practical applications designed to optimize time and resources. These tools can help jump-start stalled investigations and prevent new cases from becoming cold.

### Key Areas of Focus for Cold Case Success:

*   **Establishing Dedicated Cold Case Units:** Strategies for forming effective teams.
*   **Advanced People Searches and Database Utilization:** Methods for locating individuals.
*   **Maximizing DNA Potential:** Exploring often-overlooked sources like PKU cards.
*   **Addressing the Plight of the Missing and Unknown:** Understanding and tackling these critical issues.
*   **Leveraging Historical and Geographical Context:** Applying past information to current investigations.
*   **Comprehensive Newspaper Research:** Utilizing both online and offline archives.
*   **Accessing Public and Published Records:** Strategies for gathering and analyzing available information.
*   **The Strategic Role of Volunteers:** Engaging community support effectively.
*   **Connecting with Co-Victims and Families:** Building relationships to gather insights.
*   **Cold-Case Review Teams and Information Sharing:** Fostering collaboration for better outcomes.
*   **Effective Media Engagement:** Utilizing public outreach to generate new leads.

By promoting an innovative, "thinking-outside-the-box" approach, this volume addresses critical gaps in traditional cold case training. It empowers investigators to confidently tackle and solve mysteries previously deemed unsolvable. Silvia Pettem, a contributor to this field, was featured in a January 29, 2012, article in the Colorado Springs Gazette discussing missing persons.

Name: Lost from View
Description:
Thousands of people are reported missing each year, yet very little is known about who they are, why they disappear and what happens to them. Although the predicament of runaways and other missing children has a higher profile, the issue of missing adults has been neglected in research and policy. Drawing on almost 2000 missing persons cases the report explores: . vbTab]who goes missing;. vbTab]why people choose to go missing and how people can become missing in other circumstances;. vbTab]the experiences of missing people while they are away and the risks that they may encounter;. vbTab]how missing episodes are resolved;. vbTab]how further developments in policy and practice may assist missing people and their families. This highly topical report demonstrates that the social problems underpinning the missing issue cut across many areas of social policy. This book will therefore be essential reading for policy makers, practitioners and academics in the fields of criminal justice, child and family welfare, health and social work."

## Escaping Georgia's Chain Gang: The True Story of Robert E. Burns

**I Am a Fugitive from a Georgia Chain Gang!** recounts the incredible true story of Robert E. Burns, a man who experienced a profound fall from grace and ultimately triumphed over a deeply unjust system. This narrative explores his search for purpose, his descent into hardship, and his remarkable fight for freedom.

### A Veteran's Descent into Injustice

In 1921, Robert E. Burns, a veteran struggling with the aftermath of war and lacking financial resources, found himself entangled with a group of petty criminals. This association led him into the harsh reality of Georgia's penal system.

*   **The Crime:** Burns was sentenced to a lengthy term of six to ten years of hard labor. The offense? His involvement in a robbery that yielded less than $6.00.
*   **The Sentence:** He was shackled and forced onto a county chain gang, enduring brutal conditions.

### The First Daring Escape

After enduring four months of relentless, backbreaking labor, Burns orchestrated a daring escape. His flight for freedom involved:

*   Dodging shotgun blasts.
*   Racing through treacherous swamps.
*   Evading pursuing bloodhounds.

He successfully made his way north, reclaiming his freedom for seven years. During this time, Burns rebuilt his life in Chicago. He married and achieved success as a businessman and publisher.

### Betrayal and a Second Sentence

Tragedy struck when Burns fell in love with another woman. His jealous wife reported him to the authorities, leading to his arrest as a fugitive. Despite assurances of leniency and a swift pardon, Burns found himself back on a chain gang within a month.

### The Impossible Second Escape

Undeterred by his recapture, Burns achieved the seemingly impossible: a second escape. This time, he fled to New Jersey.

### A World Shocked by Brutality

While living in hiding as a hunted man, Burns's story culminated in the publication of his book, **I Am a Fugitive from a Georgia Chain Gang!**, in 1932. The book, along with its highly acclaimed movie adaptation nominated for a Best Picture Oscar in 1933, had a profound impact. They exposed the brutal and inhumane treatment of prisoners within Georgia's penal system to a global audience.

**I Am a Fugitive from a Georgia Chain Gang!** is a powerful and moving account. It is an epic journey filled with misfortune, love, betrayal, and thrilling adventure. Ultimately, it stands as a testament to the fugitive's unwavering courage and remarkable inner strength.

Name: Motivation + Discipline = Success
Description:
Find Your Motivation And Apply Discipline To Achieve Success In Life Why is it that some people always hit one goal after another while the rest just sit on the bleachers? Is it because some people are "naturally gifted" while others are simply "average?" If you think this way, then STOP and say "NO!" because the truth is that everyone has a chance of becoming successful. It all starts with attitude. That is why the first chapter in this book is dedicated to helping you develop a new attitude toward success. Success is not something that falls upon a person by fate. It does not happen to someone because they are more attractive or have rich parents. Success is your obligation to yourself, making it a priority. But what keeps so many people from becoming successful? There are many factors, but below are the top five reasons that could be holding you back from becoming successful. Get to know these obstacles, so you can hurdle them now! This book contains proven steps and strategies on how to achieve more than you ever dreamed of by combining motivation and discipline. The focus of this book is to help you understand the power behind self-discipline and motivation, so you can use them to fulfill your biggest goals. The principles in this book are all you need to get rid of your insecurities, defeat procrastination, and most of all, find your sense of purpose in life. Here Is A Preview Of What You'll Learn... How Self-Discipline Works The Three Keys To Unlocking Self-Discipline How To Turn Self-Discipline Into A Habit The Secrets To Motivation How to Become Intrinsically Motivated How To Beat Procrastination And Laziness Much, much more!

Name: Handbook of Research on Future of Work and Education: Implications for Curriculum Delivery and Work Design
Description:
Higher education has changed significantly over time. In particular, traditional face-to-face degrees are being revamped in a bid to ensure they stay relevant in the 21st century and are now offered online. The transition for many universities to online learning has been painful—only exacerbated by the COVID-19 pandemic, forcing many in-person students to join their virtual peers and professors to learn new technologies and techniques to educate. Moreover, work has also changed with little doubt as to the impact of digital communication, remote work, and societal change on the nature of work itself. There are arguments to be made for organizations to become more agile, flexible, entrepreneurial, and creative. As such, work and education are both traversing a path of immense changes, adapting to global trends and consumer preferences. The Handbook of Research on Future of Work and Education: Implications for Curriculum Delivery and Work Design is a comprehensive reference book that analyzes the realities of higher education today, strategies that ensure the success of academic institutions, and factors that lead to student success. In particular, the book addresses essentials of online learning, strategies to ensure the success of online degrees and courses, effective course development practices, key support mechanisms for students, and ensuring student success in online degree programs. Furthermore, the book addresses the future of work, preferences of employees, and how work can be re-designed to create further employee satisfaction, engagement, and increase productivity. In particular, the book covers insights that ensure that remote employees feel valued, included, and are being provided relevant support to thrive in their roles. Covering topics such as course development, motivating online learners, and virtual environments, this text is essential for academicians, faculty, researchers, and students globally.

**Ready for Anything: Work Smarter, Not Harder**

David Allen, the acclaimed author of the bestselling "Getting Things Done," returns with "Ready for Anything." Building on his proven methods for boosting efficiency, Allen, known as "the personal productivity guru" by Fast Company, now guides readers on how to enhance their daily performance. This insightful book, inspired by Allen's popular e-newsletter, provides 52 actionable strategies designed to:

*   **Clear your mind for creativity:** Discover techniques to declutter your thoughts and unlock innovative ideas.
*   **Sharpen your focus:** Learn how to concentrate your attention effectively on what matters most.
*   **Build effective structures:** Create systems and workflows that support your productivity goals.
*   **Take decisive action:** Master the art of moving forward and making progress on your tasks.

Through a blend of wit, inspiration, and practical advice, Allen empowers readers to achieve more with less effort and stress. "Ready for Anything" is the essential guide for anyone seeking to maximize their energy, creativity, and effectiveness in both their work and personal lives, enabling them to perform at their absolute best every single day.

Name: Self Discipline: Rising Firm and Strong: Have Motivation Advantage to Bypass Your Tipping Point by Brute Grind Instinct and Measure Your Willpower and Focus on What Matters for Happiness
Description:
If you would like to build iron-like willpower and unshakable self-discipline...and do it even if you are (currently) lazy, undisciplined, and couldn't motivate yourself out of a paper bag...then this audiobook will show you how. You might think that successful people are simply "lucky" or backed by a rich family, but that's certainly not the case most of the time. Success comes to those who are disciplined and mentally tough; people who can withstand any challenge that comes their way. Learning self-discipline is necessary to effectively organize your time and energy and to use it wisely to motivate yourself and successfully achieve all your goals and dreams. Do you want more: Self-discipline? Confidence? Self-awareness? Achievement? Many people question the value of self-discipline. For some, developing self-discipline is a pointless endeavor. Why control yourself from doing what you want when it can only make you sad? The truth is, self-discipline is not just all about control, nor is it a form of self-deprivation; rather, it is about working your way toward success. You may not see it as you take your journey, but it will soon reveal itself when you reach your goal. One of the things that could help you ultimately develop your self-discipline is to know you can get something great out of it. Realizing its benefits before you begin in your journey is a good motivational factor that will help you stick to what you have started. This audiobook is a complete guide to maintaining your composure and self-discipline at all possible scenarios and will let you achieve great success with the help of these habits.

Name: Discipline Equals Freedom
Description:
In this expanded edition of the 2017 mega-bestseller, updated with brand new sections like DO WHAT MAKES YOU HAPPY, SUGAR COATED LIES and DON'T NEGOTIATE WITH WEAKNESS, readers will discover new ways to become stronger, smarter, and healthier. Jocko Willink's methods for success were born in the SEAL Teams, where he spent most of his adult life, enlisting after high school and rising through the ranks to become the commander of the most highly decorated special operations unit of the war in Iraq. In Discipline Equals Freedom, the #1 New York Times bestselling coauthor of Extreme Ownership describes how he lives that mantra: the mental and physical disciplines he imposes on himself in order to achieve freedom in all aspects of life. Many books offer advice on how to overcome obstacles and reach your goals--but that advice often misses the most critical ingredient: discipline. Without discipline, there will be no real progress. Discipline Equals Freedom covers it all, including strategies and tactics for conquering weakness, procrastination, and fear, and specific physical training presented in workouts for beginner, intermediate, and advanced athletes, and even the best sleep habits and food intake recommended to optimize performance. FIND YOUR WILL, FIND YOUR DISCIPLINE--AND YOU WILL FIND YOUR FREEDOM

Name: Habit Harvester
Description:
The goal of Habit Harvester is to teach you how to remove, replace, and create good habits in your life. FREE BONUS: Animated Videos of Each Chapter! Along with the cognitive training, this book will give you a myriad of great habits to implement into your life! Using Psychological tricks and the science of Neuroplasticity, we can rewire our brain in many different ways, and Habit Harvester aims to do so in a constructive and healthy manner. This book also includes many creative illustrations to help in the learning process! Chapter 1: Why Habits are Important Chapter 2: How to get rid of bad habits Chapter 3: How to Replace Bad Habits Chapter 4: Use the Habit Loop to Create a New Habit and the 21-Day Myth Chapter 5: 10 Morning Habits Chapter 6: 12 Millionaire Habits Chapter 7: 10 Relationship Habits Chapter 8: 10 Happy Habits Chapter 9: 10 Healthy Habits Chapter 10: Conclusion

Name: Willpower
Description:
One of the world's most esteemed and influential psychologists, Roy F. Baumeister, teams with New York Times science writer John Tierney to reveal the secrets of self-control and how to master it. "Deep and provocative analysis of people's battle with temptation and masterful insights into understanding willpower: why we have it, why we don't, and how to build it. A terrific read." —Ravi Dhar, Yale School of Management, Director of Center for Customer Insights Pioneering research psychologist Roy F. Baumeister collaborates with New York Times science writer John Tierney to revolutionize our understanding of the most coveted human virtue: self-control. Drawing on cutting-edge research and the wisdom of real-life experts, Willpower shares lessons on how to focus our strength, resist temptation, and redirect our lives. It shows readers how to be realistic when setting goals, monitor their progress, and how to keep faith when they falter. By blending practical wisdom with the best of recent research science, Willpower makes it clear that whatever we seek—from happiness to good health to financial security—we won’t reach our goals without first learning to harness self-control.

**Master Self-Discipline and Boost Your Confidence: Your Path to a More Successful Life**

Are you ready to take control of your life and achieve your goals? This bestselling guide offers proven strategies to enhance your self-discipline and confidence, empowering you to build a more successful future.

In today's fast-paced world, many of us desire more from life. Whether you're stuck in a job you dislike, aiming for personal growth, striving to lose weight, or pursuing any other aspiration, the key to making it happen lies within you. This book provides the essential tools and insights you need to move forward.

**What You'll Discover Inside:**

*   **Conquering Your Inner Battles:** Learn to overcome the most significant challenge – yourself.
*   **Eliminating Procrastination:** Develop effective techniques to stop putting things off.
*   **Building Daily Habits:** Establish consistent routines that support your success.
*   **Setting and Achieving Goals:** Master the art of creating and completing your to-do lists.
*   **The Power of Your Mindset:** Understand how your thoughts and feelings shape your reality.
*   **Mindfulness and Gratitude:** Explore the benefits of meditation and cultivating an attitude of gratitude.
*   **Finding Motivation:** Discover simple, actionable ways to stay motivated.
*   **Becoming Your Own Ally:** Learn to be your biggest supporter and advocate.
*   **And much more!**

Investing in yourself and your future is the most valuable decision you can make. Grab this incredible eBook for just $8.99 and start transforming your life today!

## Navigating Your Mind: A Houseboat Journey

Campbell Walker's **Your Head is a Houseboat** offers a unique and humorous exploration of the human mind. Using the central metaphor of a houseboat, the book guides readers through understanding and managing their internal world. This approach makes complex psychological concepts accessible and relatable, encouraging self-awareness and better mental well-being.

### The Houseboat Metaphor Explained

The core of Walker's analogy is the houseboat, representing your mind. Just as a houseboat requires maintenance, your mind needs attention to function optimally. Key aspects of this upkeep include:

*   **Decluttering:** This involves shedding unhelpful thoughts and external opinions that can weigh you down.
*   **Taking Control:** Within your mental "houseboat," various internal "bosses" may offer conflicting advice. Furthermore, primal desires often operate "below deck." The book emphasizes that ultimately, you are the captain of your own mental vessel and should take the helm.

### Understanding Your Inner Landscape

**Your Head is a Houseboat** demystifies various aspects of our mental lives through creative and simple analogies. The book covers:

*   **Brain Function:** Explaining how the brain operates.
*   **Mental Health:** Providing insights into our overall psychological well-being.
*   **Emotions:** Exploring the nature and origins of feelings.
*   **Mindfulness:** Offering techniques for greater presence.
*   **Psychology:** Presenting psychological principles in an easy-to-understand manner.

### A Resource for Self-Discovery

Beyond its engaging prose and illustrations, the book serves as a practical tool for self-understanding. It includes:

*   **Illustrations:** Visually appealing artwork that complements the text.
*   **Journal Exercises:** Prompts designed to facilitate introspection.

**Your Head is a Houseboat** provides a humorous and approachable guide to understanding your mind, fostering a more positive internal environment. As Osher Günsberg notes, it's a "truly life-changing" and accessible mental health resource.

**The Oxford Handbook of the Global Stage Musical: A World of Song and Story**

The stage musical is a powerful global industry, reaching far beyond its traditional strongholds in the US and UK. Over the past forty years, musical theatre has blossomed worldwide. Countries have not only embraced imported hits from Broadway and London but have also cultivated their own unique traditions.

**Exploring the Global Musical Landscape**

To understand this dynamic growth, *The Oxford Handbook of the Global Stage Musical* offers fresh scholarly insights into the challenges and opportunities of international musical theatre markets. This comprehensive volume delves into the stage musical through various lenses:

*   **Theoretical Frameworks:** Examining concepts like globalization, consumer culture, and interculturalism.
*   **Analytical Approaches:** Including performance studies, musicology, historical and cultural analysis, and media studies.
*   **Social and Political Dimensions:** Investigating gender studies and international politics.

**Key Themes and Perspectives**

The thirty-three essays within the handbook explore critical aspects of the global musical:

*   **Historical Influences:** The early production and spread of musicals were significantly shaped by Western colonialism.
*   **Representation and Industry:** The handbook addresses issues of racism and sexism, both within the stories told and the industry itself.
*   **Global vs. Local:** It analyzes the ongoing tension between global trends and local interests in today's postmodern cultures.

**Diverse Voices, In-Depth Analysis**

With contributions from experts in seventeen countries, the handbook provides a rich tapestry of perspectives. These essays offer:

*   **Insider Views:** Reflecting the diverse realities of musical theatre across different cultures.
*   **Specific Case Studies:** In-depth examinations of unique cultural and economic systems.
*   **Comparative Analysis:** Penetrating comparisons of musical theatre practices in various global contexts.
*   **Transcultural Spread:** A survey of how musicals travel and transform across cultures.

Name: Anything for a Hit
Description:
Dorothy Carvello knows all about the music biz. She was the first female A&R executive at Atlantic Records, and one of the few in the room at RCA and Columbia. But before that, she was secretary to Ahmet Ertegun, Atlantic's infamous president, who signed acts like Aretha Franklin and Led Zeppelin, negotiated distribution deals with Mick Jagger, and added Neil Young to Crosby, Stills & Nash. The stories she tells about the kingmakers of the music biz are outrageous, but it is her sinuous friendship with Ahmet that frames her narrative. He was notoriously abusive, sexually harassing Dorothy on a daily basis. Carvello reveals here how she flipped the script and showed Ertegun and every other man who tried to control her that a woman can be just as willing to do what it takes to get a hit. Never-before-heard stories about artists like Michael Jackson, Madonna, Steven Tyler, Bon Jovi, INXS, Marc Anthony, and many more make this book a must-read for anyone looking for the real stories on what it takes for a woman to make it in a male-dominated industry.

Name: About Music Industry for Beginners
Description:
We must agree that the role of Arts, Commerce & Science are equally important in Career Development to survive, but we have lost the focus on ‘Arts’ or ‘Skills’ in our Education System which used to be our Assets.The goals to write this book is, 1. To develop and make a full-time career in Music Business, Music Performance, Music Production and Sound Reinforcement - The lessons describes the procedures and methods to develop a set of Skills and motivates the reader to become a self-trainable content creator, a performer or a service provider.The lessons describes to learn your responsibilities and motivates to find too many solutions for each problem and applying one of them according to the situation. 2. To spread awareness about right informations of Music Business, Music Performance, Music Production and Sound Reinforcement to the listeners (consumers, music lovers) - The lessons are simplified and properly organised.If we put an analogy of learning all about our music industry with human body analysis, then the first lesson would be about showing you a human body instead of explaining a human intestine. 3. To establish and maintain a long term business environment in Music Industry - The lessons always motivate and encourage the reader to reduce or remove dirty politics and other related loopholes existing in Music Industry by demanding and mentioning terms and responsibilities clearly in contract agreements (in written formats on stamp papers). The author may put some analogy as one of his methods to explain each lesson such as ‘Cooking Techniques’ as ‘Mixing Techniques’; ‘Hot’ as ‘Loud’, where hot can be a touch or taste sensation and loud (loudness or volume control in your remote or a dedicated knob in your playback system) as a listening sensation.If we put an analogy of learning audio recording skills with riding a bike, then the author love to explain the bike riding skills, maintenance of a bike, introducing recent technology used, safety precautions for the biker, traffic rules and regulations, but the author hasn’t explained the features and functions of different products(different brands of bikes), because features and functions changes according to recent technology development.And features and functions of different products (different brands of bikes) can be learnt through their respective official websites so that the learner as a customer will make his / her own decision about purchasing a product (certain brand of a bike) as per his / her requirements. In this book the author may have mentioned few products as examples to focus on the Technology applied in the products; that doesn’t mean he promote those products.We can’t rely on technology to correct major amount of errors because it has some limitations.For a limited time period, the technology can be used to correct a minimum amount of errors.It is better to use technology in methods for practicing more of the arts or skills so that the error will be reduced at the input. Girish Patro

Name: K-pop - The International Rise of the Korean Music Industry
Description:
K-pop, described by Time Magazine in 2012 as "South Korea’s greatest export", has rapidly achieved a large worldwide audience of devoted fans largely through distribution over the Internet. This book examines the phenomenon, and discusses the reasons for its success. It considers the national and transnational conditions that have played a role in K-pop’s ascendancy, and explores how they relate to post-colonial modernisation, post-Cold War politics in East Asia, connections with the Korean diaspora, and the state-initiated campaign to accumulate soft power. As it is particularly concerned with fandom and cultural agency, it analyses fan practices, discourses, and underlying psychologies within their local habitus as well as in expanding topographies of online networks. Overall, the book addresses the question of how far "Asian culture" can be global in a truly meaningful way, and how popular culture from a "marginal" nation has become a global phenomenon.

Name: Music Industry Scandals
Description:
""Music Industry Scandals"" explores the high-stakes world of music, dissecting major controversies that have reshaped the industry. From copyright battles to artist disputes, the book examines how these conflicts have influenced artist rights, corporate responsibility, and artistic expression. It reveals how landmark legal cases, such as the Napster controversy, have impacted digital copyright and how disputes over sampling have raised questions about cultural appropriation and intellectual property. Understanding these scandals provides crucial context for navigating the complexities of the modern music business. The book delves into the ethical dilemmas surrounding music ownership, artist royalties, and the evolving role of record labels. It examines how these scandals often serve as inflection points, forcing the industry to re-evaluate its practices and balance artistic freedom with commercial interests. By drawing from court documents, artist interviews, and industry publications, the book provides a comprehensive analysis of each scandal's events, legal proceedings, and long-term consequences. Beginning with an introduction to music law and contract negotiation, the book progresses through major case studies, culminating in an analysis of current challenges like streaming revenue distribution and AI music. This approach offers readers valuable insights into the inner workings of the music industry and the forces that continue to shape its evolution, providing a clear understanding of how past scandals inform present-day challenges.

## Artist Management: Navigating the Creative and Cultural Industries

Artists are the driving force behind growth in the creative and cultural sectors. Effectively managing this unique talent presents distinct challenges. This book offers a concise introduction and analysis of the key characteristics of artist management.

### A Key Contribution to Industry Understanding

*Artist Management: Agility in the Creative and Cultural Industries* significantly enhances our understanding of:

*   The creative and cultural industries themselves.
*   Artistic and managerial creativity.
*   Social and cultural change within this sector.

The book delves into the increasingly vital role of artist managers. It proposes that agile management strategies are particularly effective in this dynamic environment.

### The Artist-Manager Relationship in the 21st Century

This work provides a thorough yet accessible overview of the artist-manager relationship today. It is based on original research, including interviews with artist managers and self-managed artists across five major cities:

*   New York
*   London
*   Toronto
*   Sydney
*   Melbourne

The book makes an original contribution to the field by highlighting nation-specific case studies. These examples illuminate various thematic concerns within artist management.

### A Valuable Resource for Students and Professionals

This unique book is a significant research undertaking. It serves as a valuable study aid for undergraduate and postgraduate students in fields such as:

*   Arts Management
*   Creative and Cultural Industries Studies
*   Arts Entrepreneurship
*   Business and Management Studies
*   Media and Communications

Name: What They'll Never Tell You about the Music Busines
Description:
This insider guide discloses the hidden dynamics and often unfortunate consequences of what really happens when a deal is prepared, contracts are signed, and promises are made--and alerts musicians, attorneys, songwriters, and anyone else interested in the music business to the potent dangers lurking beneath the surface of this incredibly competitive industry.

Name: Made in Thailand
Description:
Made in Thailand: Studies in Popular Music serves as a comprehensive and thorough introduction to the history, culture, and musicology of twentieth- and twenty-first century popular music in Thailand. The volume consists of essays by local experts and leading scholars in Thai music and culture, and covers the major figures, styles, and social contexts of popular music in Thailand. Each essay provides adequate context so readers understand why the figure or genre under discussion is of lasting significance. Discussing musical development and shift of sociocultural spheres of Thai popular music among nationhood, media platforms, and identity politics from the early years to the present, these scholars explore and rethink the connections between the development of Thai popular music and politics of music genres in Thailand. Made in Thailand includes a general introduction to Thai popular music, followed by essays organized into four thematic sections: Histories, Contemporary Issues, Politics of Sound, and Region and Cultural Politics. Offering a comprehensive look at popular music phenomena in the country, Made in Thailand is an essential resource for scholars and students in the fields of popular music studies, ethnomusicology, popular musicology, Asian studies, and Thai studies.

## Addressing Gender Inequality in the Music Industry: A Research-Based Approach

Gender inequality remains a persistent challenge within the music industry. This open-access book delves into the complexities of this imbalance, employing an industry-specific lens to understand why progress has been so slow. It investigates the strategies currently being implemented to foster sustainable careers for women and gender-diverse individuals in music.

### Key Areas of Focus

The research presented in this volume is structured around three pivotal areas:

*   **Music Education:** Examining the foundational stages where gender dynamics begin to shape career trajectories.
*   **Industry Case Studies:** Providing in-depth analyses of current practices and policies within various sectors of the music industry.
*   **Activist Spaces:** Exploring the role of advocacy and grassroots movements in driving change.

### Intersectional Perspectives

This collection sits at the crucial intersection of musical production, the broader creative industries, and gender politics. It brings together a diverse range of research that critically considers the gendered dynamics inherent to the music industry itself.

### Global Scope and Diverse Methodologies

Adopting a global perspective, this volume addresses these issues across a wide spectrum of musical genres and theoretical frameworks. In an era of heightened awareness surrounding gender and music, this book offers:

*   **Cutting-edge research:** Contributing to ongoing discussions and debates.
*   **Insightful solutions:** Proposing pathways towards a more equitable future.

The ebook editions of this book are available open access under a CC BY-NC-ND 4.0 license on bloomsburycollections.com. Open access was funded by Knowledge Unlatched.

Name: The Death and Life of the Music Industry in the Digital Age
Description:
The Death and Life of the Music Industry in the Digital Age challenges the conventional wisdom that the internet is 'killing' the music industry. While technological innovations (primarily in the form of peer-to-peer file-sharing) have evolved to threaten the economic health of major transnational music companies, Rogers illustrates how those same companies have themselves formulated highly innovative response strategies to negate the harmful effects of the internet. In short, it documents how the radical transformative potential of the internet is being suppressed by legal and organisational innovations. Grounded in a social shaping perspective, The Death and Life of the Music Industry in the Digital Age contends that the internet has not altered pre-existing power relations in the music industry where a small handful of very large corporations have long since established an oligopolistic dominance. Furthermore, the book contends that widespread acceptance of the idea that online piracy is rampant, and music largely 'free' actually helps these major music companies in their quest to bolster their power. In doing this, the study serves to deflate much of the transformative hype and digital 'deliria' that has accompanied the internet's evolution as a medium for mass communication.

## Redeeming Productivity: Bearing Fruit Through Faith

Feeling overwhelmed and unproductive? The common image of productivity often conjures up notions of assembly lines, spreadsheets, and the hustle of the modern workplace. However, this modern perspective is a far cry from the concept's ancient roots. In the agrarian world, productivity was understood through the lens of **crop yield and fruit bearing**. This imagery offers a powerful way to understand productivity through a biblical perspective.

Jesus himself taught, "By this my Father is glorified, that you bear much fruit" (John 15:8). Who wouldn't desire a truly productive life, one that bears abundant fruit? But how can we cultivate this kind of fruitfulness in the spheres of life we hold most dear – our homes, our workplaces, and our communities? It's easy to feel overworked, overrun, defeated, and discouraged in our pursuit of productivity.

### A Biblical Perspective on Productivity

The world often presents a simple equation: be productive so you can get all you can out of this life. The Bible, however, offers a profound reorientation: be productive so you can gain more of the next life. In his book, *Redeeming Productivity*, author Reagan Rose delves into this transformative idea, exploring how God's glory is the ultimate purpose for which we are planted.

Rose argues that true productivity must be firmly rooted in the gospel. Our ability to produce good fruit is not a result of our own efforts alone, but rather a consequence of our connection to Christ, the True Vine. This vital connection is the source of our empowerment.

### Cultivating Fruitfulness: Practical Disciplines

The book illuminates how we can nurture the vitality of this connection through simple, life-giving disciplines. Readers will discover practical and manageable applications, such as:

*   **Giving God the first fruits of our days:** This involves prioritizing spiritual practices and dedicating the beginning of our time to Him.
*   **Understanding suffering as pruning:** Reagan discusses how our perspective on trials can be transformed when we view them as God's pruning for greater productivity.

By embracing these principles, we can move beyond the superficial metrics of worldly productivity and cultivate a life that truly bears fruit for God's glory.

Name: How to Be Alone
Description:
IN THIS AGE OF CONSTANT CONNECTIVITY, LEARN HOW TO ENJOY SOLITUDE AND FIND HAPPINESS WITHOUT OTHERS. Our fast-paced society does not approve of solitude; being alone is antisocial and some even find it sinister. Why is this so when autonomy, personal freedom, and individualism are more highly prized than ever before? In How to Be Alone, Sara Maitland answers this question by exploring changing attitudes throughout history. Offering experiments and strategies for overturning our fear of solitude, she helps us practice it without anxiety and encourages us to see the benefits of spending time by ourselves. By indulging in the experience of being alone, we can be inspired to find our own rewards and ultimately lead more enriched, fuller lives.

Name: The Bloomsbury Handbook of Solitude, Silence and Loneliness
Description:
The Bloomsbury Handbook of Solitude, Silence and Loneliness is the first major account integrating research on solitude, silence and loneliness from across academic disciplines and across the lifespan. The editors explore how being alone – in its different forms, positive and negative, as solitude, silence and loneliness – is learned and developed, and how it is experienced in childhood and youth, adulthood and old age. Philosophical, psychological, historical, cultural and religious issues are addressed by distinguished scholars from Europe, North and Latin America, and Asia.

**Seeking Solitude: A Journey into the Wild Heart of Southern Africa**

Adam Cruise, feeling like a "flight animal" driven to escape the overwhelming nature of urban life, yearned for a profound disconnection from mass humanity, the city, and civilization. His desire was to remove himself from the constant presence of others and immerse himself in the profound seclusion of nature, seeking peace of mind and true solitude. This deep-seated longing led him to persuade his wife, Amanda, to embark on an extraordinary six-month expedition.

**Abandoning the Familiar for the Unknown**

The couple made the significant decision to leave behind their business, home, and beloved three cats in Cape Town. Their destination: the remote interior of southern Africa. Armed with an expedition-prepared 4x4 and a singular objective – to avoid civilization as much as possible – their journey was not about a pre-planned itinerary, but rather a quest for an authentic wilderness experience.

**A Wilderness Unveiled**

Their travels wove through the most secluded corners of the sub-continent, a deliberate pursuit of a true wilderness where nature remained untrammelled by human activity. Amidst the majestic presence of lions, elephants, and a rich tapestry of African wildlife, Adam and Amanda discovered a world that felt harmonious and balanced.

**The Shadow of Human Impact**

However, this pristine natural world was not untouched. They observed firsthand the constant threat posed by the ravages of human advancement and mistreatment. This realization transformed their journey from a simple escape into a profound personal quest.

**A Philosophical Exploration of Humanity and Nature**

"In the Pursuit of Solitude" is more than just a travelogue; it's a deep dive into the eternal conflict between humanity and the environment. Through a blend of philosophical reflection, anecdotal storytelling, and a sometimes witty perspective, Adam's observations illuminate the compelling, restorative qualities of nature. Simultaneously, his narrative unveils the devastating effects of human actions, both African and Western, on even the most secluded and seemingly untouched places on Earth.

Name: True Nature
Description:
In this colorful journal, writer-illustrator Barbara Bash has re-created her chronicles of meditation and contemplative wandering during a series of solitary country retreats. Combining beautifully hand-calligraphed journal notes with watercolor-and-pencil drawings, she captures exquisite moments of magic in the natural environment: a dragonfly's brief pause, a surprised deer in tall grass, a lumbering skunk's visit, the woods at twilight. Nature lovers, gardeners, and anyone who enjoys solitary country walks will recognize in Barbara a kindred spirit and will find hours of pleasure in these pages.

Name: Solitude
Description:
"Solitude was seminal in challenging the established belief that "interpersonal relationships of an intimate kind are the chief, if not the only, source of human happiness." Indeed, most self-help literature still places relationships at the center of human existence. Lucid and lyrical, Storr's book cites numerous examples of brilliant scholars and artists -- from Beethoven and Kant to Anne Sexton and Beatrix Potter -- to demonstrate that solitude ranks alongside relationships in its impact on an individual's well-being and productivity, as well as on society's progress and health. But solitary activity is essential not only for geniuses, says Storr ; the average person, too, is enriched by spending time alone."--Back cover.

Name: Christian Minimalism
Description:
"Ehrlich’s insightful self-help guide will resonate with Christians wishing to streamline an overstuffed life."—Publishers Weekly Logically, we all know our purpose in life is not wrapped up in accumulating possessions, wealth, power, and prestige—Jesus is very clear about that—but society tells us otherwise. Christian Minimalism attempts to cut through our assumptions and society’s lies about what life should look like and invites readers into a life that Jesus calls us to live: one lived intentionally, free of physical, spiritual, and emotional clutter.
